characters.appearance: Male in his late 20s to early 30s with a medium build and olive complexion. He has short dark hair and a prominent mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt with a red and white graphic design on the front.
characters.demeanor: Focused and determined, transitioning to happy and confident.

characters.appearance: Female in her late 20s to early 30s with a medium build and fair complexion. She has long brown hair tied back in a ponytail.
Digital avatar of a young man with short dark hair and a short beard. He is only visible as a small circular profile picture within the app interface.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Environment. [Environment.]
Character C says: Let's pause. Listen to the AI tutor's pronunciation and try again. [Let's pause. Listen to the AI tutor's pronunciation and try again.]
Character B says: Environment. [Environment.]
Character A says: I have an interview tomorrow. [I have an interview tomorrow.]
Character A says: Haan yaar, same mistake. [Yeah man, same mistake.]
Character B says: I have an interview tomorrow. [I have an interview tomorrow.]
Character A says: Confident. [Confident.]
Character C says: Let's compare. Notice how the AI tutor says it? [Let's compare. Notice how the AI tutor says it?]
Character B says: Confident. [Confident.]
Character C says: Awesome! Ekdum sahi bola aapne! [Awesome! You said it perfectly!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: the learner struggling with English pronunciation and sentence delivery.
- Introduces the AI Tutor as a helpful, non-judgmental guide.
- Shows the supportive dynamic between the learner and the native speaker, highlighting the app's practical feedback loop.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Advanced, Beginner, Supernova App, AI Tutor, environment, Listening..., 76%, I have an interview tomorrow., 84%, confident, 79%, 97%

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Mujhe English bolne mein hamesha hesitation hoti thi, par Supernova app ke saath daily practice karke mera confidence kaafi badh gaya hai. [I always used to hesitate while speaking English, but practicing daily with the Supernova app has really boosted my confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shifts to a direct-to-camera testimonial to build trust.
- Articulates the emotional payoff: moving from hesitation to confidence.
- Positions Supernova as the daily habit that solves the user's core insecurity.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: interview 69%, environment 81%, schedule 91%, career 79%, confident 84%, success 91%, Close Up, AI Feedback, 41%, success

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Now, let's try the next word. [Now, let's try the next word.]
Character A says: Success. [Success.]
Character B says: Nice! Bahut badhiya! [Nice! Very good!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates real-time progress and the joy of getting it right.
- Reinforces the supportive, 'older sibling' brand tone through Character B's reaction.
- Provides a quick, satisfying resolution to the learning loop.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Native Speaker, English Learner, Supernova App, AI Tutor, success, Listening..., 94%

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Agar aap bhi fluent English bolna chahte hain, toh aaj hi Supernova app try karein. [If you also want to speak fluent English, try the Supernova app today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, encouraging Call to Action.
- Removes competitor's 'free trial' messaging to align with Supernova's premium positioning.
- Leaves the viewer with a final, empowering message to take control of their learning.
